title: Decaf
description: Decaf creates a Zen experience by removing the HUD while also enhancing the visuals, making for more immersive and beautiful gameplay.
body:
Decaf is a Minecraft modpack designed to create a Zen-like gaming experience by removing the HUD and enhancing the game's visuals. This modpack includes the Iris mod, which enhances the game's visuals with shaders, and the AutoHUD mod, which removes the HUD when it is not needed. These mods help to create a more immersive and beautiful gameplay experience as you explore and build in your stunningly enhanced world.

Decaf also includes several quality-of-life mods that assist with gameplay. With the Mouse Tweaks mod, you can easily manage your inventory and perform other actions with ease. The Sodium mod optimizes game performance for a smoother, more enjoyable gameplay experience, and other mods like Visuality and Starlight help with lighting and particles.

One of the great things about Decaf is that all the mods in the pack are client-side mods, meaning they do not need to be installed on the server. This makes it easy to play with friends who may not have the modpack installed, as you can still enjoy the enhanced visuals and streamlined gameplay features on your end. This also means that the modpack is customizable to suit your individual preferences.
